headline: Why C.H. Robinson Worldwide (CHRW) Shares Are Trading Lower Today
summary: Shares of freight transportation intermediary C.H. Robinson (NASDAQ:CHRW) fell 4.4% in the afternoon session after geopolitical tensions in the Middle East raised concerns over higher inflation and a potential economic slowdown.
